global.description: The ad features a solid green background with text and shapes.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two abstract shapes, one oval and one rectangle, in a lighter shade of green.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: A larger rectangular shape in the center, possibly for content display.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle shape positioned towards the bottom left.

elements.label: Another small circle
elements.description: Another small circle shape located near the bottom right.

elements.label: HorizonHop logo
elements.description: The text 'HorizonHop' in bold, modern font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The phrase 'Fly smarter Special fares today' in a prominent, easy-to-read font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button at the bottom with the text 'Shop now' in bold.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, HorizonHop logo, special fares.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline in the center, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: HorizonHop, Fly smarter Special fares today, Shop now
